violations.text: The door to the outside, located at the store entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/20/2026

Raw animal foods (eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (cheese) in the dairy reach-in. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food during storage to prevent contamination. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2025

The doors to the outside, located at the front entrance and back exit, are not tight-fitting. Space observed at the bottom of the doors. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the shelves of the dairy reach-in have an accumulation of black residue and other debris. Shelving must be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items (shelving) were observed in the back storage room against the exit door. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2025

Raw animal foods (eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (milk) in the dairy reach-in. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food during storage. New Violation. Correct By: 03/21/2024

The floor in the walk-in cooler has an accumulation of milk that has spilled from a container. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/22/2024

Unnecessary, unused, and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed at the back of the store and in front of the back exit door. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary, unused, and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024
